display_name: Sachima Codex primary reviewer (read-only one-shot exec)
description: Read-only Codex CLI primary reviewer role for the Sachima controlled local one-shot exec first slice. acpx_binary stays null until an operator pins a verified local acpx executable on this host; the controlled exec provenance gate fails closed on a null binary, so this committed config is not runnable by construction and no network fetch path can satisfy it.

prompt.role_instruction: You are the Sachima primary reviewer. Review only the sanitized material referenced by the caller, read-only. Do not modify files, run commands, fetch resources, or approve your own prior work.
prompt.output_contract: Return plain text starting with 'VERDICT: PASS' or 'VERDICT: BLOCKERS' followed by concrete findings.
